title: cracca polyphylla
intro: Cracca polyphylla, also known as Bird's Foot Trefoil, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cracca polyphylla include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Herbal preparations of Cracca polyphylla include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and wellness.
